headline: Bank of America resumes Tesla stock coverage. Here’s the new price target
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has resumed coverage of Tesla with a Buy rating, assigning it a new price target in a note on Wednesday, arguing that the company remains the clear leader in consumer autonomy and is well-positioned for the next phase of the Auto 2.0 landscape.
